This '''space station''' was a facility used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. It seemed to be used as a staging area and command post.

==Characteristics==
The station appeared to have facilities large enough to handle an influx of starfighters and [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]].

Little is known of the layout of the space station, save that it housed a sizeable [[Holoprojector/Legends|holoprojection]] chamber.

==History==
A fleet of [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ships]] and [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Jedi starfighters]] made a stop at this station, following the defeat at the [[Evacuation of Rhen Var]], and the loss of the planet to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. It was on this space station that [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] were briefed by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] on their mission to [[Conquest of Raxus Prime|capture]] [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]].
